title: Team start: Fiery Kindling Brazier (9f4026) - Commit Marshal under owner direction
body:
Team-start report — Fiery Kindling Brazier (claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 9f4026), owner-nominated Commit Marshal.

Foundation: complete (start-right-team SKILL §0 + §0.5 preconditions live; foundation directives, RULES_INDEX, distilled.md, napkin.md, repo-continuity, eef thread record, recent comms all read).

Heartbeat cron status: started (event ab01da4e at 13:04:26Z; loop session bc7wvf8ch persistent; 4-min cadence).

Comms watcher status: started (task b9wbhzovg, all-channels, self-exclusion to Fiery Kindling Brazier / claude / 9f4026; seen-file Fiery-Kindling-Brazier.json).

Inherited working-tree status: non-clean. 10 modified + 20 untracked files. The modified+untracked set matches Thermal Buffeting Plume's enumerated docs-only handoff bundle (curator-pass closeout: napkin, curator-passes/README, 2026-05-25-thermal-buffeting-plume.md pass-log, repo-continuity, agentic-engineering-enhancements.next-session, memory-surface-critical-drain plan, PDR-081, curator-pass SKILL, start-right-team SKILL, closed-claims.archive, shared-comms-log) plus accumulated coordination substrate (16 comms events authored by Thermal + Eclipsed; 3 comms-seen files including my own Fiery-Kindling-Brazier.json).

HEAD: 78a90723 (chore(memory): capture human-composer-tui session insights in pending-graduations). Active claims: empty. Active commit queue: empty.

Intended boundary: Commit Marshal. Standing duty per feedback_marshal_queues_comms_and_memory_state — land Thermal's docs-only curator-pass bundle and accumulated coordination substrate as one or more well-formed commits during this tree-green window. No source code changes inside marshal scope.

Acknowledgement of Thermal handoff (event 19e1a300 at 13:03:47Z): noted. Thermal stood down before staging; pre-pause checks recorded by Thermal as green for the docs-only bundle (git diff --check ok, focused markdownlint ok, practice:fitness:informational + --strict-hard both SOFT (20 soft), collaboration-state check ok). Red signals Thermal observed (sdk-codegen fetch timeout to open-api.thenational.academy; sdk/search/curriculum type/lint errors; MCP UI/a11y startup failure from missing generated sdk-codegen dist api-schema path-parameters.js) are OUTSIDE the docs-only marshal scope — they will be surfaced to owner before any whole-repo gate-run that touches them.

Gate-verification offer: I am the only agent present; I am the de facto gate-runner. Plan: rely on Thermal's focused-bundle green evidence for the docs-only scope; pre-commit husky hook will re-run gates on the staged bundle when I commit. The whole-repo pnpm check failures Thermal observed are NOT going to be addressed inside marshal scope — they are pre-existing red signals that need owner direction before being touched.

Claim status: none yet — opening a git:index/head commit-window claim only after I have surfaced the bundle scope to the owner and got authorisation to land. Singleton-marshal-per-window discipline observed; no other agents currently present.

Useful capability: long-lived (4.7 1M context), can carry multiple commit cycles in one session if needed.

Constraint or risk: no source claim opens until owner confirms marshal scope; if the owner widens scope to touch the red signals (sdk-codegen, type/lint, e2e startup), that is a separate cycle with its own claim and review — not a marshal-only operation.

Preferred boundary: docs/state/coordination only.

— Fiery Kindling Brazier (9f4026)
